FROM (
    SELECT p.id, p.avg_rating, p.cancellation_policy, p.city, p.country, p.created_at, p.current_bookings, p.description, p.destination, p.duration_days, p.duration_nights, p.is_featured, p.max_capacity, p.min_age, p.packager_id, p.status, p.title, p.total_reviews, p.package_type, p.updated_at

    WHERE p.id = @__packageId_0

SELECT t.id, t.avg_rating, t.cancellation_policy, t.city, t.country, t.created_at, t.current_bookings, t.description, t.destination, t.duration_days, t.duration_nights, t.is_featured, t.max_capacity, t.min_age, t.packager_id, t.status, t.title, t.total_reviews, t.package_type, t.updated_at, p1.id, p2.id, p2.caption, p2.category, p2.display_order, p2.file_name, p2.file_path, p2.file_size_bytes, p2.is_primary, p2.mime_type, p2.package_id, p2.uploaded_at, p3.id, p3.available_slots, p3.base_price, p3.child_price, p3.discount_percent, p3.end_date, p3.is_active, p3.package_id, p3.season_name, p3.start_date, p1.approved_at, p1.approved_by, p1.avg_rating, p1.business_license_no, p1.company_name, p1.contact_email, p1.contact_phone, p1.created_at, p1.deactivated_at, p1.deactivation_reason, p1.description, p1.total_reviews, p1.updated_at, p1.user_id, p1.website_url
FROM (
    SELECT p.id, p.avg_rating, p.cancellation_policy, p.city, p.country, p.created_at, p.current_bookings, p.description, p.destination, p.duration_days, p.duration_nights, p.is_featured, p.max_capacity, p.min_age, p.packager_id, p.status, p.title, p.total_reviews, p.package_type, p.updated_at
    FROM packages AS p
    WHERE p.status = 'published'::package_status AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM package_seasonal_pricing AS p0
        WHERE p.id = p0.package_id AND p0.is_active AND p0.end_date >= @__today_0)
    ORDER BY p.created_at DESC
    LIMIT @__p_2 OFFSET @__p_1
) AS t
INNER JOIN packagers AS p1 ON t.packager_id = p1.id
LEFT JOIN package_media AS p2 ON t.id = p2.package_id
LEFT JOIN package_seasonal_pricing AS p3 ON t.id = p3.package_id
ORDER BY t.created_at DESC, t.id, p1.id, p2.id

SELECT count(*)::int
FROM packages AS p
WHERE p.status = 'published'::package_status AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM package_seasonal_pricing AS p0
    WHERE p.id = p0.package_id AND p0.is_active AND p0.end_date >= @__today_0)
2026-06-18 14:21:04.926 +05:30 [INF] Executed DbCommand (24ms) [Parameters=[@__today_0='?' (DbType = Date), @__p_2='?' (DbType = Int32), @__p_1='?' (DbType = Int32)], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT t.id, t.avg_rating, t.cancellation_policy, t.city, t.country, t.created_at, t.current_bookings, t.description, t.destination, t.duration_days, t.duration_nights, t.is_featured, t.max_capacity, t.min_age, t.packager_id, t.status, t.title, t.total_reviews, t.package_type, t.updated_at, p1.id, p2.id, p2.caption, p2.category, p2.display_order, p2.file_name, p2.file_path, p2.file_size_bytes, p2.is_primary, p2.mime_type, p2.package_id, p2.uploaded_at, p3.id, p3.available_slots, p3.base_price, p3.child_price, p3.discount_percent, p3.end_date, p3.is_active, p3.package_id, p3.season_name, p3.start_date, p1.approved_at, p1.approved_by, p1.avg_rating, p1.business_license_no, p1.company_name, p1.contact_email, p1.contact_phone, p1.created_at, p1.deactivated_at, p1.deactivation_reason, p1.description, p1.total_reviews, p1.updated_at, p1.user_id, p1.website_url
FROM (
    SELECT p.id, p.avg_rating, p.cancellation_policy, p.city, p.country, p.created_at, p.current_bookings, p.description, p.destination, p.duration_days, p.duration_nights, p.is_featured, p.max_capacity, p.min_age, p.packager_id, p.status, p.title, p.total_reviews, p.package_type, p.updated_at
    FROM packages AS p
    WHERE p.status = 'published'::package_status AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM package_seasonal_pricing AS p0
        WHERE p.id = p0.package_id AND p0.is_active AND p0.end_date >= @__today_0)
    ORDER BY p.created_at DESC
    LIMIT @__p_2 OFFSET @__p_1
) AS t
INNER JOIN packagers AS p1 ON t.packager_id = p1.id
LEFT JOIN package_media AS p2 ON t.id = p2.package_id
LEFT JOIN package_seasonal_pricing AS p3 ON t.id = p3.package_id
ORDER BY t.created_at DESC, t.id, p1.id, p2.id

FROM (
    SELECT p.id, p.avg_rating, p.cancellation_policy, p.city, p.country, p.created_at, p.current_bookings, p.description, p.destination, p.duration_days, p.duration_nights, p.is_featured, p.max_capacity, p.min_age, p.packager_id, p.status, p.title, p.total_reviews, p.package_type, p.updated_at

    WHERE p.status = 'published'::package_status AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM package_seasonal_pricing AS p0
        WHERE p.id = p0.package_id AND p0.is_active AND p0.end_date >= @__today_0)
    ORDER BY p.created_at DESC
    LIMIT @__p_2 OFFSET @__p_1
) AS t

LEFT JOIN package_media AS p2 ON t.id = p2.package_id

SELECT count(*)::int
FROM packages AS p
WHERE p.status = 'published'::package_status AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM package_seasonal_pricing AS p0
    WHERE p.id = p0.package_id AND p0.is_active AND p0.end_date >= @__today_0)

SELECT t.id, t.avg_rating, t.cancellation_policy, t.city, t.country, t.created_at, t.current_bookings, t.description, t.destination, t.duration_days, t.duration_nights, t.is_featured, t.max_capacity, t.min_age, t.packager_id, t.status, t.title, t.total_reviews, t.package_type, t.updated_at, p1.id, p2.id, p2.caption, p2.category, p2.display_order, p2.file_name, p2.file_path, p2.file_size_bytes, p2.is_primary, p2.mime_type, p2.package_id, p2.uploaded_at, p3.id, p3.available_slots, p3.base_price, p3.child_price, p3.discount_percent, p3.end_date, p3.is_active, p3.package_id, p3.season_name, p3.start_date, p1.approved_at, p1.approved_by, p1.avg_rating, p1.business_license_no, p1.company_name, p1.contact_email, p1.contact_phone, p1.created_at, p1.deactivated_at, p1.deactivation_reason, p1.description, p1.total_reviews, p1.updated_at, p1.user_id, p1.website_url
FROM (
    SELECT p.id, p.avg_rating, p.cancellation_policy, p.city, p.country, p.created_at, p.current_bookings, p.description, p.destination, p.duration_days, p.duration_nights, p.is_featured, p.max_capacity, p.min_age, p.packager_id, p.status, p.title, p.total_reviews, p.package_type, p.updated_at
    FROM packages AS p
    WHERE p.status = 'published'::package_status AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM package_seasonal_pricing AS p0
        WHERE p.id = p0.package_id AND p0.is_active AND p0.end_date >= @__today_0)
    ORDER BY p.created_at DESC
    LIMIT @__p_2 OFFSET @__p_1
) AS t
INNER JOIN packagers AS p1 ON t.packager_id = p1.id
LEFT JOIN package_media AS p2 ON t.id = p2.package_id
LEFT JOIN package_seasonal_pricing AS p3 ON t.id = p3.package_id
ORDER BY t.created_at DESC, t.id, p1.id, p2.id

    SELECT p.id, p.avg_rating, p.cancellation_policy, p.city, p.country, p.created_at, p.current_bookings, p.description, p.destination, p.duration_days, p.duration_nights, p.is_featured, p.max_capacity, p.min_age, p.packager_id, p.status, p.title, p.total_reviews, p.package_type, p.updated_at

FROM (
    SELECT p.id, p.avg_rating, p.cancellation_policy, p.city, p.country, p.created_at, p.current_bookings, p.description, p.destination, p.duration_days, p.duration_nights, p.is_featured, p.max_capacity, p.min_age, p.packager_id, p.status, p.title, p.total_reviews, p.package_type, p.updated_at, p0.id AS id0, p0.approved_at, p0.approved_by, p0.avg_rating AS avg_rating0, p0.business_license_no, p0.company_name, p0.contact_email, p0.contact_phone, p0.created_at AS created_at0, p0.deactivated_at, p0.deactivation_reason, p0.description AS description0, p0.total_reviews AS total_reviews0, p0.updated_at AS updated_at0, p0.user_id, p0.website_url
    FROM packages AS p
    INNER JOIN packagers AS p0 ON p.packager_id = p0.id
    WHERE p.id = @__packageId_0
    LIMIT 1
) AS t
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT i.id, i.created_at, i.day_number, i.description, i.location, i.package_id, i.title, i0.id AS id0, i0.activity_title, i0.activity_type, i0.session, i0.description AS description0, i0.duration_minutes, i0.extra_cost, i0.is_optional, i0.itinerary_day_id, i0.location AS location0, i0.sequence_order, i1.id AS id1, i1.description AS description1, i1.is_included, i1.itinerary_day_id AS itinerary_day_id0, i1.meal, i1.venue, p1.id AS id2, p1.amenities, p1.check_in_time, p1.check_out_time, p1.hotel_address, p1.hotel_name, p1.itinerary_day_id AS itinerary_day_id1, p1.notes, p1.room_type, p1.star_rating, p2.id AS id3, p2.distance_km, p2.drop_point, p2.drop_time, p2.itinerary_day_id AS itinerary_day_id2, p2.notes AS notes0, p2.pickup_point, p2.pickup_time, p2.segment_order, p2.mode, p2.vehicle_description
    FROM itinerary_days AS i
    LEFT JOIN itinerary_activities AS i0 ON i.id = i0.itinerary_day_id
    LEFT JOIN itinerary_day_meals AS i1 ON i.id = i1.itinerary_day_id
    LEFT JOIN package_accommodation AS p1 ON i.id = p1.itinerary_day_id
    LEFT JOIN package_transport AS p2 ON i.id = p2.itinerary_day_id
) AS t0 ON t.id = t0.package_id
LEFT JOIN package_highlights AS p3 ON t.id = p3.package_id
LEFT JOIN package_inclusions AS p4 ON t.id = p4.package_id
LEFT JOIN package_media AS p5 ON t.id = p5.package_id
LEFT JOIN package_seasonal_pricing AS p6 ON t.id = p6.package_id
LEFT JOIN reviews AS r ON t.id = r.package_id
ORDER BY t.id, t.id0, t0.id, t0.id0, t0.id1, t0.id2, t0.id3, p3.id, p4.id, p5.id, p6.id

FROM (
    SELECT p.id, p.avg_rating, p.cancellation_policy, p.city, p.country, p.created_at, p.current_bookings, p.description, p.destination, p.duration_days, p.duration_nights, p.is_featured, p.max_capacity, p.min_age, p.packager_id, p.status, p.title, p.total_reviews, p.package_type, p.updated_at, p0.id AS id0, p0.approved_at, p0.approved_by, p0.avg_rating AS avg_rating0, p0.business_license_no, p0.company_name, p0.contact_email, p0.contact_phone, p0.created_at AS created_at0, p0.deactivated_at, p0.deactivation_reason, p0.description AS description0, p0.total_reviews AS total_reviews0, p0.updated_at AS updated_at0, p0.user_id, p0.website_url
    FROM packages AS p
    INNER JOIN packagers AS p0 ON p.packager_id = p0.id
    WHERE p.id = @__packageId_0
    LIMIT 1
) AS t
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT i.id, i.created_at, i.day_number, i.description, i.location, i.package_id, i.title, i0.id AS id0, i0.activity_title, i0.activity_type, i0.session, i0.description AS description0, i0.duration_minutes, i0.extra_cost, i0.is_optional, i0.itinerary_day_id, i0.location AS location0, i0.sequence_order, i1.id AS id1, i1.description AS description1, i1.is_included, i1.itinerary_day_id AS itinerary_day_id0, i1.meal, i1.venue, p1.id AS id2, p1.amenities, p1.check_in_time, p1.check_out_time, p1.hotel_address, p1.hotel_name, p1.itinerary_day_id AS itinerary_day_id1, p1.notes, p1.room_type, p1.star_rating, p2.id AS id3, p2.distance_km, p2.drop_point, p2.drop_time, p2.itinerary_day_id AS itinerary_day_id2, p2.notes AS notes0, p2.pickup_point, p2.pickup_time, p2.segment_order, p2.mode, p2.vehicle_description
    FROM itinerary_days AS i
    LEFT JOIN itinerary_activities AS i0 ON i.id = i0.itinerary_day_id
    LEFT JOIN itinerary_day_meals AS i1 ON i.id = i1.itinerary_day_id
    LEFT JOIN package_accommodation AS p1 ON i.id = p1.itinerary_day_id
    LEFT JOIN package_transport AS p2 ON i.id = p2.itinerary_day_id
) AS t0 ON t.id = t0.package_id
LEFT JOIN package_highlights AS p3 ON t.id = p3.package_id
LEFT JOIN package_inclusions AS p4 ON t.id = p4.package_id
LEFT JOIN package_media AS p5 ON t.id = p5.package_id
LEFT JOIN package_seasonal_pricing AS p6 ON t.id = p6.package_id
LEFT JOIN reviews AS r ON t.id = r.package_id
ORDER BY t.id, t.id0, t0.id, t0.id0, t0.id1, t0.id2, t0.id3, p3.id, p4.id, p5.id, p6.id

SELECT b.id, b.adult_count, b.booked_at, b.booking_reference, b.cancellation_reason, b.cancelled_at, b.child_count, b.infant_count, b.package_id, b.packager_base_amount, b.paid_amount, b.payment_status, b.platform_fee_amount, b.platform_fee_percent, b.return_date, b.seasonal_pricing_id, b.special_requests, b.status, b.tax_amount, b.total_amount, b.travel_date, b.updated_at, b.user_id, p.id, t0.id, t0.aadhar_card_number, t0.age, t0.booking_id, t0.date_of_birth, t0.full_name, t0.gender, t0.is_primary, t0.meal_preference, t0.nationality, t0.passport_number, t0.id0, t0.booking_id0, t0.document_type, t0.file_name, t0.file_path, t0.file_size_bytes, t0.mime_type, t0.original_filename, t0.rejection_reason, t0.status, t0.traveler_id, t0.uploaded_at, t0.verified_at, t0.verified_by, p.avg_rating, p.cancellation_policy, p.city, p.country, p.created_at, p.current_bookings, p.description, p.destination, p.duration_days, p.duration_nights, p.is_featured, p.max_capacity, p.min_age, p.packager_id, p.status, p.title, p.total_reviews, p.package_type, p.updated_at
FROM bookings AS b
INNER JOIN packages AS p ON b.package_id = p.id
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT b0.id, b0.aadhar_card_number, b0.age, b0.booking_id, b0.date_of_birth, b0.full_name, b0.gender, b0.is_primary, b0.meal_preference, b0.nationality, b0.passport_number, t.id AS id0, t.booking_id AS booking_id0, t.document_type, t.file_name, t.file_path, t.file_size_bytes, t.mime_type, t.original_filename, t.rejection_reason, t.status, t.traveler_id, t.uploaded_at, t.verified_at, t.verified_by
    FROM booking_travelers AS b0
    LEFT JOIN travel_documents AS t ON b0.id = t.traveler_id
) AS t0 ON b.id = t0.booking_id
WHERE b.user_id = @__userId_0
ORDER BY b.booked_at DESC, b.id, p.id, t0.id

    SELECT b0.id, b0.aadhar_card_number, b0.age, b0.booking_id, b0.date_of_birth, b0.full_name, b0.gender, b0.is_primary, b0.meal_preference, b0.nationality, b0.passport_number, t.id AS id0, t.booking_id AS booking_id0, t.document_type, t.file_name, t.file_path, t.file_size_bytes, t.mime_type, t.original_filename, t.rejection_reason, t.status, t.traveler_id, t.uploaded_at, t.verified_at, t.verified_by

) AS t0 ON b.id = t0.booking_id

) AS t0 ON b.id = t0.booking_id

SELECT t.id, t.avg_rating, t.cancellation_policy, t.city, t.country, t.created_at, t.current_bookings, t.description, t.destination, t.duration_days, t.duration_nights, t.is_featured, t.max_capacity, t.min_age, t.packager_id, t.status, t.title, t.total_reviews, t.package_type, t.updated_at, p1.id, p2.id, p2.caption, p2.category, p2.display_order, p2.file_name, p2.file_path, p2.file_size_bytes, p2.is_primary, p2.mime_type, p2.package_id, p2.uploaded_at, p3.id, p3.available_slots, p3.base_price, p3.child_price, p3.discount_percent, p3.end_date, p3.is_active, p3.package_id, p3.season_name, p3.start_date, p1.approved_at, p1.approved_by, p1.avg_rating, p1.business_license_no, p1.company_name, p1.contact_email, p1.contact_phone, p1.created_at, p1.deactivated_at, p1.deactivation_reason, p1.description, p1.total_reviews, p1.updated_at, p1.user_id, p1.website_url
FROM (
    SELECT p.id, p.avg_rating, p.cancellation_policy, p.city, p.country, p.created_at, p.current_bookings, p.description, p.destination, p.duration_days, p.duration_nights, p.is_featured, p.max_capacity, p.min_age, p.packager_id, p.status, p.title, p.total_reviews, p.package_type, p.updated_at
    FROM packages AS p
    WHERE p.status = 'published'::package_status AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM package_seasonal_pricing AS p0
        WHERE p.id = p0.package_id AND p0.is_active AND p0.end_date >= @__today_0)
    ORDER BY p.created_at DESC
    LIMIT @__p_2 OFFSET @__p_1
) AS t
INNER JOIN packagers AS p1 ON t.packager_id = p1.id
LEFT JOIN package_media AS p2 ON t.id = p2.package_id
LEFT JOIN package_seasonal_pricing AS p3 ON t.id = p3.package_id
ORDER BY t.created_at DESC, t.id, p1.id, p2.id

FROM (
    SELECT p.id, p.avg_rating, p.cancellation_policy, p.city, p.country, p.created_at, p.current_bookings, p.description, p.destination, p.duration_days, p.duration_nights, p.is_featured, p.max_capacity, p.min_age, p.packager_id, p.status, p.title, p.total_reviews, p.package_type, p.updated_at

        SELECT 1
        FROM package_seasonal_pricing AS p0

) AS t

    INNER JOIN packagers AS p0 ON p.packager_id = p0.id
    WHERE p.id = @__packageId_0
    LIMIT 1
) AS t
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT i.id, i.created_at, i.day_number, i.description, i.location, i.package_id, i.title, i0.id AS id0, i0.activity_title, i0.activity_type, i0.session, i0.description AS description0, i0.duration_minutes, i0.extra_cost, i0.is_optional, i0.itinerary_day_id, i0.location AS location0, i0.sequence_order, i1.id AS id1, i1.description AS description1, i1.is_included, i1.itinerary_day_id AS itinerary_day_id0, i1.meal, i1.venue, p1.id AS id2, p1.amenities, p1.check_in_time, p1.check_out_time, p1.hotel_address, p1.hotel_name, p1.itinerary_day_id AS itinerary_day_id1, p1.notes, p1.room_type, p1.star_rating, p2.id AS id3, p2.distance_km, p2.drop_point, p2.drop_time, p2.itinerary_day_id AS itinerary_day_id2, p2.notes AS notes0, p2.pickup_point, p2.pickup_time, p2.segment_order, p2.mode, p2.vehicle_description
    FROM itinerary_days AS i
    LEFT JOIN itinerary_activities AS i0 ON i.id = i0.itinerary_day_id
    LEFT JOIN itinerary_day_meals AS i1 ON i.id = i1.itinerary_day_id
    LEFT JOIN package_accommodation AS p1 ON i.id = p1.itinerary_day_id
    LEFT JOIN package_transport AS p2 ON i.id = p2.itinerary_day_id
) AS t0 ON t.id = t0.package_id
LEFT JOIN package_highlights AS p3 ON t.id = p3.package_id
LEFT JOIN package_inclusions AS p4 ON t.id = p4.package_id
LEFT JOIN package_media AS p5 ON t.id = p5.package_id
LEFT JOIN package_seasonal_pricing AS p6 ON t.id = p6.package_id
LEFT JOIN reviews AS r ON t.id = r.package_id
ORDER BY t.id, t.id0, t0.id, t0.id0, t0.id1, t0.id2, t0.id3, p3.id, p4.id, p5.id, p6.id

SELECT t.id, t.avg_rating, t.cancellation_policy, t.city, t.country, t.created_at, t.current_bookings, t.description, t.destination, t.duration_days, t.duration_nights, t.is_featured, t.max_capacity, t.min_age, t.packager_id, t.status, t.title, t.total_reviews, t.package_type, t.updated_at, p1.id, p2.id, p2.caption, p2.category, p2.display_order, p2.file_name, p2.file_path, p2.file_size_bytes, p2.is_primary, p2.mime_type, p2.package_id, p2.uploaded_at, p3.id, p3.available_slots, p3.base_price, p3.child_price, p3.discount_percent, p3.end_date, p3.is_active, p3.package_id, p3.season_name, p3.start_date, p1.approved_at, p1.approved_by, p1.avg_rating, p1.business_license_no, p1.company_name, p1.contact_email, p1.contact_phone, p1.created_at, p1.deactivated_at, p1.deactivation_reason, p1.description, p1.total_reviews, p1.updated_at, p1.user_id, p1.website_url
FROM (
    SELECT p.id, p.avg_rating, p.cancellation_policy, p.city, p.country, p.created_at, p.current_bookings, p.description, p.destination, p.duration_days, p.duration_nights, p.is_featured, p.max_capacity, p.min_age, p.packager_id, p.status, p.title, p.total_reviews, p.package_type, p.updated_at
    FROM packages AS p
    WHERE p.status = 'published'::package_status AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM package_seasonal_pricing AS p0
        WHERE p.id = p0.package_id AND p0.is_active AND p0.end_date >= @__today_0)
    ORDER BY p.created_at DESC
    LIMIT @__p_2 OFFSET @__p_1
) AS t
INNER JOIN packagers AS p1 ON t.packager_id = p1.id
LEFT JOIN package_media AS p2 ON t.id = p2.package_id
LEFT JOIN package_seasonal_pricing AS p3 ON t.id = p3.package_id
ORDER BY t.created_at DESC, t.id, p1.id, p2.id

    WHERE p.id = @__packageId_0
    LIMIT 1
) AS t

    FROM itinerary_days AS i

    LEFT JOIN itinerary_day_meals AS i1 ON i.id = i1.itinerary_day_id

FROM packages AS p

FROM (
    SELECT p.id, p.avg_rating, p.cancellation_policy, p.city, p.country, p.created_at, p.current_bookings, p.description, p.destination, p.duration_days, p.duration_nights, p.is_featured, p.max_capacity, p.min_age, p.packager_id, p.status, p.title, p.total_reviews, p.package_type, p.updated_at
    FROM packages AS p
    WHERE p.status = 'published'::package_status AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM package_seasonal_pricing AS p0
        WHERE p.id = p0.package_id AND p0.is_active AND p0.end_date >= @__today_0)
    ORDER BY p.created_at DESC
    LIMIT @__p_2 OFFSET @__p_1
) AS t
INNER JOIN packagers AS p1 ON t.packager_id = p1.id
LEFT JOIN package_media AS p2 ON t.id = p2.package_id

ORDER BY t.created_at DESC, t.id, p1.id, p2.id

    LEFT JOIN itinerary_activities AS i0 ON i.id = i0.itinerary_day_id
    LEFT JOIN itinerary_day_meals AS i1 ON i.id = i1.itinerary_day_id
    LEFT JOIN package_accommodation AS p1 ON i.id = p1.itinerary_day_id
    LEFT JOIN package_transport AS p2 ON i.id = p2.itinerary_day_id
) AS t0 ON t.id = t0.package_id
LEFT JOIN package_highlights AS p3 ON t.id = p3.package_id
LEFT JOIN package_inclusions AS p4 ON t.id = p4.package_id
LEFT JOIN package_media AS p5 ON t.id = p5.package_id
LEFT JOIN package_seasonal_pricing AS p6 ON t.id = p6.package_id
LEFT JOIN reviews AS r ON t.id = r.package_id
ORDER BY t.id, t.id0, t0.id, t0.id0, t0.id1, t0.id2, t0.id3, p3.id, p4.id, p5.id, p6.id

) AS t0 ON b.id = t0.booking_id
WHERE b.user_id = @__userId_0

SELECT count(*)::int
FROM packages AS p
WHERE p.status = 'published'::package_status AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM package_seasonal_pricing AS p0
    WHERE p.id = p0.package_id AND p0.is_active AND p0.end_date >= @__today_0)
2026-06-18 14:51:45.038 +05:30 [INF] Executed DbCommand (6ms) [Parameters=[@__today_0='?' (DbType = Date), @__p_2='?' (DbType = Int32), @__p_1='?' (DbType = Int32)], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT t.id, t.avg_rating, t.cancellation_policy, t.city, t.country, t.created_at, t.current_bookings, t.description, t.destination, t.duration_days, t.duration_nights, t.is_featured, t.max_capacity, t.min_age, t.packager_id, t.status, t.title, t.total_reviews, t.package_type, t.updated_at, p1.id, p2.id, p2.caption, p2.category, p2.display_order, p2.file_name, p2.file_path, p2.file_size_bytes, p2.is_primary, p2.mime_type, p2.package_id, p2.uploaded_at, p3.id, p3.available_slots, p3.base_price, p3.child_price, p3.discount_percent, p3.end_date, p3.is_active, p3.package_id, p3.season_name, p3.start_date, p1.approved_at, p1.approved_by, p1.avg_rating, p1.business_license_no, p1.company_name, p1.contact_email, p1.contact_phone, p1.created_at, p1.deactivated_at, p1.deactivation_reason, p1.description, p1.total_reviews, p1.updated_at, p1.user_id, p1.website_url
FROM (
    SELECT p.id, p.avg_rating, p.cancellation_policy, p.city, p.country, p.created_at, p.current_bookings, p.description, p.destination, p.duration_days, p.duration_nights, p.is_featured, p.max_capacity, p.min_age, p.packager_id, p.status, p.title, p.total_reviews, p.package_type, p.updated_at
    FROM packages AS p
    WHERE p.status = 'published'::package_status AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM package_seasonal_pricing AS p0
        WHERE p.id = p0.package_id AND p0.is_active AND p0.end_date >= @__today_0)
    ORDER BY p.created_at DESC
    LIMIT @__p_2 OFFSET @__p_1
) AS t
INNER JOIN packagers AS p1 ON t.packager_id = p1.id
LEFT JOIN package_media AS p2 ON t.id = p2.package_id
LEFT JOIN package_seasonal_pricing AS p3 ON t.id = p3.package_id
ORDER BY t.created_at DESC, t.id, p1.id, p2.id

SELECT count(*)::int
FROM packages AS p
WHERE p.status = 'published'::package_status AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM package_seasonal_pricing AS p0
    WHERE p.id = p0.package_id AND p0.is_active AND p0.end_date >= @__today_0)
2026-06-18 14:53:51.813 +05:30 [INF] Executed DbCommand (6ms) [Parameters=[@__today_0='?' (DbType = Date), @__p_2='?' (DbType = Int32), @__p_1='?' (DbType = Int32)], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT t.id, t.avg_rating, t.cancellation_policy, t.city, t.country, t.created_at, t.current_bookings, t.description, t.destination, t.duration_days, t.duration_nights, t.is_featured, t.max_capacity, t.min_age, t.packager_id, t.status, t.title, t.total_reviews, t.package_type, t.updated_at, p1.id, p2.id, p2.caption, p2.category, p2.display_order, p2.file_name, p2.file_path, p2.file_size_bytes, p2.is_primary, p2.mime_type, p2.package_id, p2.uploaded_at, p3.id, p3.available_slots, p3.base_price, p3.child_price, p3.discount_percent, p3.end_date, p3.is_active, p3.package_id, p3.season_name, p3.start_date, p1.approved_at, p1.approved_by, p1.avg_rating, p1.business_license_no, p1.company_name, p1.contact_email, p1.contact_phone, p1.created_at, p1.deactivated_at, p1.deactivation_reason, p1.description, p1.total_reviews, p1.updated_at, p1.user_id, p1.website_url
FROM (
    SELECT p.id, p.avg_rating, p.cancellation_policy, p.city, p.country, p.created_at, p.current_bookings, p.description, p.destination, p.duration_days, p.duration_nights, p.is_featured, p.max_capacity, p.min_age, p.packager_id, p.status, p.title, p.total_reviews, p.package_type, p.updated_at
    FROM packages AS p
    WHERE p.status = 'published'::package_status AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM package_seasonal_pricing AS p0
        WHERE p.id = p0.package_id AND p0.is_active AND p0.end_date >= @__today_0)
    ORDER BY p.created_at DESC
    LIMIT @__p_2 OFFSET @__p_1
) AS t
INNER JOIN packagers AS p1 ON t.packager_id = p1.id
LEFT JOIN package_media AS p2 ON t.id = p2.package_id
LEFT JOIN package_seasonal_pricing AS p3 ON t.id = p3.package_id
ORDER BY t.created_at DESC, t.id, p1.id, p2.id

FROM (
    SELECT p.id, p.avg_rating, p.cancellation_policy, p.city, p.country, p.created_at, p.current_bookings, p.description, p.destination, p.duration_days, p.duration_nights, p.is_featured, p.max_capacity, p.min_age, p.packager_id, p.status, p.title, p.total_reviews, p.package_type, p.updated_at
    FROM packages AS p
    WHERE p.status = 'published'::package_status AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM package_seasonal_pricing AS p0
        WHERE p.id = p0.package_id AND p0.is_active AND p0.end_date >= @__today_0)
    ORDER BY p.created_at DESC
    LIMIT @__p_2 OFFSET @__p_1
) AS t
INNER JOIN packagers AS p1 ON t.packager_id = p1.id
LEFT JOIN package_media AS p2 ON t.id = p2.package_id
LEFT JOIN package_seasonal_pricing AS p3 ON t.id = p3.package_id
ORDER BY t.created_at DESC, t.id, p1.id, p2.id

SELECT count(*)::int
FROM packages AS p
WHERE p.status = 'published'::package_status AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM package_seasonal_pricing AS p0
    WHERE p.id = p0.package_id AND p0.is_active AND p0.end_date >= @__today_0)
2026-06-18 14:58:02.800 +05:30 [INF] Executed DbCommand (4ms) [Parameters=[@__today_0='?' (DbType = Date), @__p_2='?' (DbType = Int32), @__p_1='?' (DbType = Int32)], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT t.id, t.avg_rating, t.cancellation_policy, t.city, t.country, t.created_at, t.current_bookings, t.description, t.destination, t.duration_days, t.duration_nights, t.is_featured, t.max_capacity, t.min_age, t.packager_id, t.status, t.title, t.total_reviews, t.package_type, t.updated_at, p1.id, p2.id, p2.caption, p2.category, p2.display_order, p2.file_name, p2.file_path, p2.file_size_bytes, p2.is_primary, p2.mime_type, p2.package_id, p2.uploaded_at, p3.id, p3.available_slots, p3.base_price, p3.child_price, p3.discount_percent, p3.end_date, p3.is_active, p3.package_id, p3.season_name, p3.start_date, p1.approved_at, p1.approved_by, p1.avg_rating, p1.business_license_no, p1.company_name, p1.contact_email, p1.contact_phone, p1.created_at, p1.deactivated_at, p1.deactivation_reason, p1.description, p1.total_reviews, p1.updated_at, p1.user_id, p1.website_url
FROM (
    SELECT p.id, p.avg_rating, p.cancellation_policy, p.city, p.country, p.created_at, p.current_bookings, p.description, p.destination, p.duration_days, p.duration_nights, p.is_featured, p.max_capacity, p.min_age, p.packager_id, p.status, p.title, p.total_reviews, p.package_type, p.updated_at
    FROM packages AS p
    WHERE p.status = 'published'::package_status AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM package_seasonal_pricing AS p0
        WHERE p.id = p0.package_id AND p0.is_active AND p0.end_date >= @__today_0)
    ORDER BY p.created_at DESC
    LIMIT @__p_2 OFFSET @__p_1
) AS t
INNER JOIN packagers AS p1 ON t.packager_id = p1.id
LEFT JOIN package_media AS p2 ON t.id = p2.package_id
LEFT JOIN package_seasonal_pricing AS p3 ON t.id = p3.package_id
ORDER BY t.created_at DESC, t.id, p1.id, p2.id

SELECT count(*)::int
FROM packages AS p
WHERE p.status = 'published'::package_status AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM package_seasonal_pricing AS p0
    WHERE p.id = p0.package_id AND p0.is_active AND p0.end_date >= @__today_0)
2026-06-18 15:00:08.808 +05:30 [INF] Executed DbCommand (2ms) [Parameters=[@__today_0='?' (DbType = Date), @__p_2='?' (DbType = Int32), @__p_1='?' (DbType = Int32)], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT t.id, t.avg_rating, t.cancellation_policy, t.city, t.country, t.created_at, t.current_bookings, t.description, t.destination, t.duration_days, t.duration_nights, t.is_featured, t.max_capacity, t.min_age, t.packager_id, t.status, t.title, t.total_reviews, t.package_type, t.updated_at, p1.id, p2.id, p2.caption, p2.category, p2.display_order, p2.file_name, p2.file_path, p2.file_size_bytes, p2.is_primary, p2.mime_type, p2.package_id, p2.uploaded_at, p3.id, p3.available_slots, p3.base_price, p3.child_price, p3.discount_percent, p3.end_date, p3.is_active, p3.package_id, p3.season_name, p3.start_date, p1.approved_at, p1.approved_by, p1.avg_rating, p1.business_license_no, p1.company_name, p1.contact_email, p1.contact_phone, p1.created_at, p1.deactivated_at, p1.deactivation_reason, p1.description, p1.total_reviews, p1.updated_at, p1.user_id, p1.website_url
FROM (
    SELECT p.id, p.avg_rating, p.cancellation_policy, p.city, p.country, p.created_at, p.current_bookings, p.description, p.destination, p.duration_days, p.duration_nights, p.is_featured, p.max_capacity, p.min_age, p.packager_id, p.status, p.title, p.total_reviews, p.package_type, p.updated_at
    FROM packages AS p
    WHERE p.status = 'published'::package_status AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM package_seasonal_pricing AS p0
        WHERE p.id = p0.package_id AND p0.is_active AND p0.end_date >= @__today_0)
    ORDER BY p.created_at DESC
    LIMIT @__p_2 OFFSET @__p_1
) AS t
INNER JOIN packagers AS p1 ON t.packager_id = p1.id
LEFT JOIN package_media AS p2 ON t.id = p2.package_id
LEFT JOIN package_seasonal_pricing AS p3 ON t.id = p3.package_id
ORDER BY t.created_at DESC, t.id, p1.id, p2.id

FROM (
    SELECT p.id, p.avg_rating, p.cancellation_policy, p.city, p.country, p.created_at, p.current_bookings, p.description, p.destination, p.duration_days, p.duration_nights, p.is_featured, p.max_capacity, p.min_age, p.packager_id, p.status, p.title, p.total_reviews, p.package_type, p.updated_at
    FROM packages AS p
    WHERE p.status = 'published'::package_status AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM package_seasonal_pricing AS p0
        WHERE p.id = p0.package_id AND p0.is_active AND p0.end_date >= @__today_0)
    ORDER BY p.created_at DESC
    LIMIT @__p_2 OFFSET @__p_1
) AS t
INNER JOIN packagers AS p1 ON t.packager_id = p1.id
LEFT JOIN package_media AS p2 ON t.id = p2.package_id
LEFT JOIN package_seasonal_pricing AS p3 ON t.id = p3.package_id
ORDER BY t.created_at DESC, t.id, p1.id, p2.id

FROM (
    SELECT p.id, p.avg_rating, p.cancellation_policy, p.city, p.country, p.created_at, p.current_bookings, p.description, p.destination, p.duration_days, p.duration_nights, p.is_featured, p.max_capacity, p.min_age, p.packager_id, p.status, p.title, p.total_reviews, p.package_type, p.updated_at

    INNER JOIN packagers AS p0 ON p.packager_id = p0.id
    WHERE p.id = @__packageId_0
    LIMIT 1
) AS t

    SELECT i.id, i.created_at, i.day_number, i.description, i.location, i.package_id, i.title, i0.id AS id0, i0.activity_title, i0.activity_type, i0.session, i0.description AS description0, i0.duration_minutes, i0.extra_cost, i0.is_optional, i0.itinerary_day_id, i0.location AS location0, i0.sequence_order, i1.id AS id1, i1.description AS description1, i1.is_included, i1.itinerary_day_id AS itinerary_day_id0, i1.meal, i1.venue, p1.id AS id2, p1.amenities, p1.check_in_time, p1.check_out_time, p1.hotel_address, p1.hotel_name, p1.itinerary_day_id AS itinerary_day_id1, p1.notes, p1.room_type, p1.star_rating, p2.id AS id3, p2.distance_km, p2.drop_point, p2.drop_time, p2.itinerary_day_id AS itinerary_day_id2, p2.notes AS notes0, p2.pickup_point, p2.pickup_time, p2.segment_order, p2.mode, p2.vehicle_description

FROM (
    SELECT p.id, p.avg_rating, p.cancellation_policy, p.city, p.country, p.created_at, p.current_bookings, p.description, p.destination, p.duration_days, p.duration_nights, p.is_featured, p.max_capacity, p.min_age, p.packager_id, p.status, p.title, p.total_reviews, p.package_type, p.updated_at
    FROM packages AS p
    WHERE p.status = 'published'::package_status AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM package_seasonal_pricing AS p0
        WHERE p.id = p0.package_id AND p0.is_active AND p0.end_date >= @__today_0) AND p.package_type = @__parsedType_1
    ORDER BY p.created_at DESC
    LIMIT @__p_3 OFFSET @__p_2
) AS t
INNER JOIN packagers AS p1 ON t.packager_id = p1.id
LEFT JOIN package_media AS p2 ON t.id = p2.package_id
LEFT JOIN package_seasonal_pricing AS p3 ON t.id = p3.package_id
ORDER BY t.created_at DESC, t.id, p1.id, p2.id

INNER JOIN packages AS p ON b.package_id = p.id

    SELECT b0.id, b0.aadhar_card_number, b0.age, b0.booking_id, b0.date_of_birth, b0.full_name, b0.gender, b0.is_primary, b0.meal_preference, b0.nationality, b0.passport_number, t.id AS id0, t.booking_id AS booking_id0, t.document_type, t.file_name, t.file_path, t.file_size_bytes, t.mime_type, t.original_filename, t.rejection_reason, t.status, t.traveler_id, t.uploaded_at, t.verified_at, t.verified_by

    LEFT JOIN travel_documents AS t ON b0.id = t.traveler_id
) AS t0 ON b.id = t0.booking_id
WHERE b.user_id = @__userId_0
ORDER BY b.booked_at DESC, b.id, p.id, t0.id

SELECT count(*)::int
FROM packages AS p
WHERE p.status = 'published'::package_status AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM package_seasonal_pricing AS p0
    WHERE p.id = p0.package_id AND p0.is_active AND p0.end_date >= @__today_0)
2026-06-18 15:06:55.767 +05:30 [INF] Executed DbCommand (5ms) [Parameters=[@__today_0='?' (DbType = Date), @__p_2='?' (DbType = Int32), @__p_1='?' (DbType = Int32)], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT t.id, t.avg_rating, t.cancellation_policy, t.city, t.country, t.created_at, t.current_bookings, t.description, t.destination, t.duration_days, t.duration_nights, t.is_featured, t.max_capacity, t.min_age, t.packager_id, t.status, t.title, t.total_reviews, t.package_type, t.updated_at, p1.id, p2.id, p2.caption, p2.category, p2.display_order, p2.file_name, p2.file_path, p2.file_size_bytes, p2.is_primary, p2.mime_type, p2.package_id, p2.uploaded_at, p3.id, p3.available_slots, p3.base_price, p3.child_price, p3.discount_percent, p3.end_date, p3.is_active, p3.package_id, p3.season_name, p3.start_date, p1.approved_at, p1.approved_by, p1.avg_rating, p1.business_license_no, p1.company_name, p1.contact_email, p1.contact_phone, p1.created_at, p1.deactivated_at, p1.deactivation_reason, p1.description, p1.total_reviews, p1.updated_at, p1.user_id, p1.website_url
FROM (
    SELECT p.id, p.avg_rating, p.cancellation_policy, p.city, p.country, p.created_at, p.current_bookings, p.description, p.destination, p.duration_days, p.duration_nights, p.is_featured, p.max_capacity, p.min_age, p.packager_id, p.status, p.title, p.total_reviews, p.package_type, p.updated_at
    FROM packages AS p
    WHERE p.status = 'published'::package_status AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM package_seasonal_pricing AS p0
        WHERE p.id = p0.package_id AND p0.is_active AND p0.end_date >= @__today_0)
    ORDER BY p.created_at DESC
    LIMIT @__p_2 OFFSET @__p_1
) AS t
INNER JOIN packagers AS p1 ON t.packager_id = p1.id
LEFT JOIN package_media AS p2 ON t.id = p2.package_id
LEFT JOIN package_seasonal_pricing AS p3 ON t.id = p3.package_id
ORDER BY t.created_at DESC, t.id, p1.id, p2.id

FROM (
    SELECT p.id, p.avg_rating, p.cancellation_policy, p.city, p.country, p.created_at, p.current_bookings, p.description, p.destination, p.duration_days, p.duration_nights, p.is_featured, p.max_capacity, p.min_age, p.packager_id, p.status, p.title, p.total_reviews, p.package_type, p.updated_at
    FROM packages AS p
    WHERE p.status = 'published'::package_status AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM package_seasonal_pricing AS p0
        WHERE p.id = p0.package_id AND p0.is_active AND p0.end_date >= @__today_0)
    ORDER BY p.created_at DESC
    LIMIT @__p_2 OFFSET @__p_1
) AS t

ORDER BY t.created_at DESC, t.id, p1.id, p2.id

SELECT t.id, t.avg_rating, t.cancellation_policy, t.city, t.country, t.created_at, t.current_bookings, t.description, t.destination, t.duration_days, t.duration_nights, t.is_featured, t.max_capacity, t.min_age, t.packager_id, t.status, t.title, t.total_reviews, t.package_type, t.updated_at, p1.id, p2.id, p2.caption, p2.category, p2.display_order, p2.file_name, p2.file_path, p2.file_size_bytes, p2.is_primary, p2.mime_type, p2.package_id, p2.uploaded_at, p3.id, p3.available_slots, p3.base_price, p3.child_price, p3.discount_percent, p3.end_date, p3.is_active, p3.package_id, p3.season_name, p3.start_date, p1.approved_at, p1.approved_by, p1.avg_rating, p1.business_license_no, p1.company_name, p1.contact_email, p1.contact_phone, p1.created_at, p1.deactivated_at, p1.deactivation_reason, p1.description, p1.total_reviews, p1.updated_at, p1.user_id, p1.website_url
FROM (
    SELECT p.id, p.avg_rating, p.cancellation_policy, p.city, p.country, p.created_at, p.current_bookings, p.description, p.destination, p.duration_days, p.duration_nights, p.is_featured, p.max_capacity, p.min_age, p.packager_id, p.status, p.title, p.total_reviews, p.package_type, p.updated_at
    FROM packages AS p
    WHERE p.status = 'published'::package_status AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM package_seasonal_pricing AS p0
        WHERE p.id = p0.package_id AND p0.is_active AND p0.end_date >= @__today_0)
    ORDER BY p.created_at DESC
    LIMIT @__p_2 OFFSET @__p_1
) AS t
INNER JOIN packagers AS p1 ON t.packager_id = p1.id
LEFT JOIN package_media AS p2 ON t.id = p2.package_id
LEFT JOIN package_seasonal_pricing AS p3 ON t.id = p3.package_id
ORDER BY t.created_at DESC, t.id, p1.id, p2.id

SELECT w.id, w.created_at, w.package_id, w.user_id, p.id, p.avg_rating, p.cancellation_policy, p.city, p.country, p.created_at, p.current_bookings, p.description, p.destination, p.duration_days, p.duration_nights, p.is_featured, p.max_capacity, p.min_age, p.packager_id, p.status, p.title, p.total_reviews, p.package_type, p.updated_at, p0.id, p0.approved_at, p0.approved_by, p0.avg_rating, p0.business_license_no, p0.company_name, p0.contact_email, p0.contact_phone, p0.created_at, p0.deactivated_at, p0.deactivation_reason, p0.description, p0.total_reviews, p0.updated_at, p0.user_id, p0.website_url, p1.id, p1.caption, p1.category, p1.display_order, p1.file_name, p1.file_path, p1.file_size_bytes, p1.is_primary, p1.mime_type, p1.package_id, p1.uploaded_at, p2.id, p2.available_slots, p2.base_price, p2.child_price, p2.discount_percent, p2.end_date, p2.is_active, p2.package_id, p2.season_name, p2.start_date
FROM wishlists AS w
INNER JOIN packages AS p ON w.package_id = p.id
INNER JOIN packagers AS p0 ON p.packager_id = p0.id
LEFT JOIN package_media AS p1 ON p.id = p1.package_id
LEFT JOIN package_seasonal_pricing AS p2 ON p.id = p2.package_id
WHERE w.user_id = @__userId_0 AND p.status = 'published'::package_status
ORDER BY w.created_at DESC, w.id, p.id, p0.id, p1.id

FROM wishlists AS w

INNER JOIN packagers AS p0 ON p.packager_id = p0.id

LEFT JOIN package_seasonal_pricing AS p2 ON p.id = p2.package_id
WHERE w.user_id = @__userId_0 AND p.status = 'published'::package_status
ORDER BY w.created_at DESC, w.id, p.id, p0.id, p1.id

FROM (
    SELECT p.id, p.avg_rating, p.cancellation_policy, p.city, p.country, p.created_at, p.current_bookings, p.description, p.destination, p.duration_days, p.duration_nights, p.is_featured, p.max_capacity, p.min_age, p.packager_id, p.status, p.title, p.total_reviews, p.package_type, p.updated_at
    FROM packages AS p
    WHERE p.status = 'published'::package_status AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM package_seasonal_pricing AS p0
        WHERE p.id = p0.package_id AND p0.is_active AND p0.end_date >= @__today_0)
    ORDER BY p.created_at DESC
    LIMIT @__p_2 OFFSET @__p_1
) AS t
INNER JOIN packagers AS p1 ON t.packager_id = p1.id
LEFT JOIN package_media AS p2 ON t.id = p2.package_id
LEFT JOIN package_seasonal_pricing AS p3 ON t.id = p3.package_id
ORDER BY t.created_at DESC, t.id, p1.id, p2.id

SELECT t.id, t.avg_rating, t.cancellation_policy, t.city, t.country, t.created_at, t.current_bookings, t.description, t.destination, t.duration_days, t.duration_nights, t.is_featured, t.max_capacity, t.min_age, t.packager_id, t.status, t.title, t.total_reviews, t.package_type, t.updated_at, p1.id, p2.id, p2.caption, p2.category, p2.display_order, p2.file_name, p2.file_path, p2.file_size_bytes, p2.is_primary, p2.mime_type, p2.package_id, p2.uploaded_at, p3.id, p3.available_slots, p3.base_price, p3.child_price, p3.discount_percent, p3.end_date, p3.is_active, p3.package_id, p3.season_name, p3.start_date, p1.approved_at, p1.approved_by, p1.avg_rating, p1.business_license_no, p1.company_name, p1.contact_email, p1.contact_phone, p1.created_at, p1.deactivated_at, p1.deactivation_reason, p1.description, p1.total_reviews, p1.updated_at, p1.user_id, p1.website_url
FROM (
    SELECT p.id, p.avg_rating, p.cancellation_policy, p.city, p.country, p.created_at, p.current_bookings, p.description, p.destination, p.duration_days, p.duration_nights, p.is_featured, p.max_capacity, p.min_age, p.packager_id, p.status, p.title, p.total_reviews, p.package_type, p.updated_at
    FROM packages AS p
    WHERE p.status = 'published'::package_status AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM package_seasonal_pricing AS p0
        WHERE p.id = p0.package_id AND p0.is_active AND p0.end_date >= @__today_0)
    ORDER BY p.created_at DESC
    LIMIT @__p_2 OFFSET @__p_1
) AS t
INNER JOIN packagers AS p1 ON t.packager_id = p1.id
LEFT JOIN package_media AS p2 ON t.id = p2.package_id
LEFT JOIN package_seasonal_pricing AS p3 ON t.id = p3.package_id
ORDER BY t.created_at DESC, t.id, p1.id, p2.id

FROM (
    SELECT p.id, p.avg_rating, p.cancellation_policy, p.city, p.country, p.created_at, p.current_bookings, p.description, p.destination, p.duration_days, p.duration_nights, p.is_featured, p.max_capacity, p.min_age, p.packager_id, p.status, p.title, p.total_reviews, p.package_type, p.updated_at
    FROM packages AS p
    WHERE p.status = 'published'::package_status AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM package_seasonal_pricing AS p0
        WHERE p.id = p0.package_id AND p0.is_active AND p0.end_date >= @__today_0)
    ORDER BY p.created_at DESC
    LIMIT @__p_2 OFFSET @__p_1
) AS t
INNER JOIN packagers AS p1 ON t.packager_id = p1.id
LEFT JOIN package_media AS p2 ON t.id = p2.package_id
LEFT JOIN package_seasonal_pricing AS p3 ON t.id = p3.package_id
ORDER BY t.created_at DESC, t.id, p1.id, p2.id

FROM (
    SELECT p.id, p.avg_rating, p.cancellation_policy, p.city, p.country, p.created_at, p.current_bookings, p.description, p.destination, p.duration_days, p.duration_nights, p.is_featured, p.max_capacity, p.min_age, p.packager_id, p.status, p.title, p.total_reviews, p.package_type, p.updated_at

    SELECT p.id, p.avg_rating, p.cancellation_policy, p.city, p.country, p.created_at, p.current_bookings, p.description, p.destination, p.duration_days, p.duration_nights, p.is_featured, p.max_capacity, p.min_age, p.packager_id, p.status, p.title, p.total_reviews, p.package_type, p.updated_at, p0.id AS id0, p0.approved_at, p0.approved_by, p0.avg_rating AS avg_rating0, p0.business_license_no, p0.company_name, p0.contact_email, p0.contact_phone, p0.created_at AS created_at0, p0.deactivated_at, p0.deactivation_reason, p0.description AS description0, p0.total_reviews AS total_reviews0, p0.updated_at AS updated_at0, p0.user_id, p0.website_url
    FROM packages AS p
    INNER JOIN packagers AS p0 ON p.packager_id = p0.id
    WHERE p.id = @__packageId_0
    LIMIT 1
) AS t
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT i.id, i.created_at, i.day_number, i.description, i.location, i.package_id, i.title, i0.id AS id0, i0.activity_title, i0.activity_type, i0.session, i0.description AS description0, i0.duration_minutes, i0.extra_cost, i0.is_optional, i0.itinerary_day_id, i0.location AS location0, i0.sequence_order, i1.id AS id1, i1.description AS description1, i1.is_included, i1.itinerary_day_id AS itinerary_day_id0, i1.meal, i1.venue, p1.id AS id2, p1.amenities, p1.check_in_time, p1.check_out_time, p1.hotel_address, p1.hotel_name, p1.itinerary_day_id AS itinerary_day_id1, p1.notes, p1.room_type, p1.star_rating, p2.id AS id3, p2.distance_km, p2.drop_point, p2.drop_time, p2.itinerary_day_id AS itinerary_day_id2, p2.notes AS notes0, p2.pickup_point, p2.pickup_time, p2.segment_order, p2.mode, p2.vehicle_description
    FROM itinerary_days AS i
    LEFT JOIN itinerary_activities AS i0 ON i.id = i0.itinerary_day_id
    LEFT JOIN itinerary_day_meals AS i1 ON i.id = i1.itinerary_day_id
    LEFT JOIN package_accommodation AS p1 ON i.id = p1.itinerary_day_id
    LEFT JOIN package_transport AS p2 ON i.id = p2.itinerary_day_id
) AS t0 ON t.id = t0.package_id
LEFT JOIN package_highlights AS p3 ON t.id = p3.package_id
LEFT JOIN package_inclusions AS p4 ON t.id = p4.package_id
LEFT JOIN package_media AS p5 ON t.id = p5.package_id
LEFT JOIN package_seasonal_pricing AS p6 ON t.id = p6.package_id
LEFT JOIN reviews AS r ON t.id = r.package_id
ORDER BY t.id, t.id0, t0.id, t0.id0, t0.id1, t0.id2, t0.id3, p3.id, p4.id, p5.id, p6.id

SELECT w.id, w.created_at, w.package_id, w.user_id, p.id, p.avg_rating, p.cancellation_policy, p.city, p.country, p.created_at, p.current_bookings, p.description, p.destination, p.duration_days, p.duration_nights, p.is_featured, p.max_capacity, p.min_age, p.packager_id, p.status, p.title, p.total_reviews, p.package_type, p.updated_at, p0.id, p0.approved_at, p0.approved_by, p0.avg_rating, p0.business_license_no, p0.company_name, p0.contact_email, p0.contact_phone, p0.created_at, p0.deactivated_at, p0.deactivation_reason, p0.description, p0.total_reviews, p0.updated_at, p0.user_id, p0.website_url, p1.id, p1.caption, p1.category, p1.display_order, p1.file_name, p1.file_path, p1.file_size_bytes, p1.is_primary, p1.mime_type, p1.package_id, p1.uploaded_at, p2.id, p2.available_slots, p2.base_price, p2.child_price, p2.discount_percent, p2.end_date, p2.is_active, p2.package_id, p2.season_name, p2.start_date
FROM wishlists AS w
INNER JOIN packages AS p ON w.package_id = p.id
INNER JOIN packagers AS p0 ON p.packager_id = p0.id
LEFT JOIN package_media AS p1 ON p.id = p1.package_id
LEFT JOIN package_seasonal_pricing AS p2 ON p.id = p2.package_id
WHERE w.user_id = @__userId_0 AND p.status = 'published'::package_status
ORDER BY w.created_at DESC, w.id, p.id, p0.id, p1.id

2026-06-18 15:22:04.862 +05:30 [INF] Executed DbCommand (4ms) [Parameters=[@__today_0='?' (DbType = Date)], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT count(*)::int
FROM packages AS p
WHERE p.status = 'published'::package_status AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM package_seasonal_pricing AS p0
    WHERE p.id = p0.package_id AND p0.is_active AND p0.end_date >= @__today_0)
2026-06-18 15:22:04.866 +05:30 [INF] Executed DbCommand (2ms) [Parameters=[@__today_0='?' (DbType = Date), @__p_2='?' (DbType = Int32), @__p_1='?' (DbType = Int32)], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT t.id, t.avg_rating, t.cancellation_policy, t.city, t.country, t.created_at, t.current_bookings, t.description, t.destination, t.duration_days, t.duration_nights, t.is_featured, t.max_capacity, t.min_age, t.packager_id, t.status, t.title, t.total_reviews, t.package_type, t.updated_at, p1.id, p2.id, p2.caption, p2.category, p2.display_order, p2.file_name, p2.file_path, p2.file_size_bytes, p2.is_primary, p2.mime_type, p2.package_id, p2.uploaded_at, p3.id, p3.available_slots, p3.base_price, p3.child_price, p3.discount_percent, p3.end_date, p3.is_active, p3.package_id, p3.season_name, p3.start_date, p1.approved_at, p1.approved_by, p1.avg_rating, p1.business_license_no, p1.company_name, p1.contact_email, p1.contact_phone, p1.created_at, p1.deactivated_at, p1.deactivation_reason, p1.description, p1.total_reviews, p1.updated_at, p1.user_id, p1.website_url
FROM (
    SELECT p.id, p.avg_rating, p.cancellation_policy, p.city, p.country, p.created_at, p.current_bookings, p.description, p.destination, p.duration_days, p.duration_nights, p.is_featured, p.max_capacity, p.min_age, p.packager_id, p.status, p.title, p.total_reviews, p.package_type, p.updated_at
    FROM packages AS p
    WHERE p.status = 'published'::package_status AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM package_seasonal_pricing AS p0
        WHERE p.id = p0.package_id AND p0.is_active AND p0.end_date >= @__today_0)
    ORDER BY p.created_at DESC
    LIMIT @__p_2 OFFSET @__p_1
) AS t
INNER JOIN packagers AS p1 ON t.packager_id = p1.id
LEFT JOIN package_media AS p2 ON t.id = p2.package_id
LEFT JOIN package_seasonal_pricing AS p3 ON t.id = p3.package_id
ORDER BY t.created_at DESC, t.id, p1.id, p2.id

SELECT count(*)::int
FROM packages AS p
WHERE p.status = 'published'::package_status AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM package_seasonal_pricing AS p0
    WHERE p.id = p0.package_id AND p0.is_active AND p0.end_date >= @__today_0)

SELECT t.id, t.avg_rating, t.cancellation_policy, t.city, t.country, t.created_at, t.current_bookings, t.description, t.destination, t.duration_days, t.duration_nights, t.is_featured, t.max_capacity, t.min_age, t.packager_id, t.status, t.title, t.total_reviews, t.package_type, t.updated_at, p1.id, p2.id, p2.caption, p2.category, p2.display_order, p2.file_name, p2.file_path, p2.file_size_bytes, p2.is_primary, p2.mime_type, p2.package_id, p2.uploaded_at, p3.id, p3.available_slots, p3.base_price, p3.child_price, p3.discount_percent, p3.end_date, p3.is_active, p3.package_id, p3.season_name, p3.start_date, p1.approved_at, p1.approved_by, p1.avg_rating, p1.business_license_no, p1.company_name, p1.contact_email, p1.contact_phone, p1.created_at, p1.deactivated_at, p1.deactivation_reason, p1.description, p1.total_reviews, p1.updated_at, p1.user_id, p1.website_url
FROM (
    SELECT p.id, p.avg_rating, p.cancellation_policy, p.city, p.country, p.created_at, p.current_bookings, p.description, p.destination, p.duration_days, p.duration_nights, p.is_featured, p.max_capacity, p.min_age, p.packager_id, p.status, p.title, p.total_reviews, p.package_type, p.updated_at
    FROM packages AS p
    WHERE p.status = 'published'::package_status AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM package_seasonal_pricing AS p0
        WHERE p.id = p0.package_id AND p0.is_active AND p0.end_date >= @__today_0)
    ORDER BY p.created_at DESC
    LIMIT @__p_2 OFFSET @__p_1
) AS t
INNER JOIN packagers AS p1 ON t.packager_id = p1.id
LEFT JOIN package_media AS p2 ON t.id = p2.package_id
LEFT JOIN package_seasonal_pricing AS p3 ON t.id = p3.package_id
ORDER BY t.created_at DESC, t.id, p1.id, p2.id

FROM (
    SELECT p.id, p.avg_rating, p.cancellation_policy, p.city, p.country, p.created_at, p.current_bookings, p.description, p.destination, p.duration_days, p.duration_nights, p.is_featured, p.max_capacity, p.min_age, p.packager_id, p.status, p.title, p.total_reviews, p.package_type, p.updated_at

        SELECT 1

) AS t

SELECT t.id, t.avg_rating, t.cancellation_policy, t.city, t.country, t.created_at, t.current_bookings, t.description, t.destination, t.duration_days, t.duration_nights, t.is_featured, t.max_capacity, t.min_age, t.packager_id, t.status, t.title, t.total_reviews, t.package_type, t.updated_at, p1.id, p2.id, p2.caption, p2.category, p2.display_order, p2.file_name, p2.file_path, p2.file_size_bytes, p2.is_primary, p2.mime_type, p2.package_id, p2.uploaded_at, p3.id, p3.available_slots, p3.base_price, p3.child_price, p3.discount_percent, p3.end_date, p3.is_active, p3.package_id, p3.season_name, p3.start_date, p1.approved_at, p1.approved_by, p1.avg_rating, p1.business_license_no, p1.company_name, p1.contact_email, p1.contact_phone, p1.created_at, p1.deactivated_at, p1.deactivation_reason, p1.description, p1.total_reviews, p1.updated_at, p1.user_id, p1.website_url
FROM (
    SELECT p.id, p.avg_rating, p.cancellation_policy, p.city, p.country, p.created_at, p.current_bookings, p.description, p.destination, p.duration_days, p.duration_nights, p.is_featured, p.max_capacity, p.min_age, p.packager_id, p.status, p.title, p.total_reviews, p.package_type, p.updated_at
    FROM packages AS p
    WHERE p.status = 'published'::package_status AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM package_seasonal_pricing AS p0
        WHERE p.id = p0.package_id AND p0.is_active AND p0.end_date >= @__today_0)
    ORDER BY p.created_at DESC
    LIMIT @__p_2 OFFSET @__p_1
) AS t
INNER JOIN packagers AS p1 ON t.packager_id = p1.id
LEFT JOIN package_media AS p2 ON t.id = p2.package_id
LEFT JOIN package_seasonal_pricing AS p3 ON t.id = p3.package_id
ORDER BY t.created_at DESC, t.id, p1.id, p2.id

FROM wishlists AS w
INNER JOIN packages AS p ON w.package_id = p.id
INNER JOIN packagers AS p0 ON p.packager_id = p0.id
LEFT JOIN package_media AS p1 ON p.id = p1.package_id

ORDER BY w.created_at DESC, w.id, p.id, p0.id, p1.id

INNER JOIN packagers AS p0 ON p.packager_id = p0.id

LEFT JOIN package_seasonal_pricing AS p2 ON p.id = p2.package_id

    SELECT p.id, p.avg_rating, p.cancellation_policy, p.city, p.country, p.created_at, p.current_bookings, p.description, p.destination, p.duration_days, p.duration_nights, p.is_featured, p.max_capacity, p.min_age, p.packager_id, p.status, p.title, p.total_reviews, p.package_type, p.updated_at, p0.id AS id0, p0.approved_at, p0.approved_by, p0.avg_rating AS avg_rating0, p0.business_license_no, p0.company_name, p0.contact_email, p0.contact_phone, p0.created_at AS created_at0, p0.deactivated_at, p0.deactivation_reason, p0.description AS description0, p0.total_reviews AS total_reviews0, p0.updated_at AS updated_at0, p0.user_id, p0.website_url
    FROM packages AS p
    INNER JOIN packagers AS p0 ON p.packager_id = p0.id
    WHERE p.id = @__packageId_0
    LIMIT 1
) AS t
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT i.id, i.created_at, i.day_number, i.description, i.location, i.package_id, i.title, i0.id AS id0, i0.activity_title, i0.activity_type, i0.session, i0.description AS description0, i0.duration_minutes, i0.extra_cost, i0.is_optional, i0.itinerary_day_id, i0.location AS location0, i0.sequence_order, i1.id AS id1, i1.description AS description1, i1.is_included, i1.itinerary_day_id AS itinerary_day_id0, i1.meal, i1.venue, p1.id AS id2, p1.amenities, p1.check_in_time, p1.check_out_time, p1.hotel_address, p1.hotel_name, p1.itinerary_day_id AS itinerary_day_id1, p1.notes, p1.room_type, p1.star_rating, p2.id AS id3, p2.distance_km, p2.drop_point, p2.drop_time, p2.itinerary_day_id AS itinerary_day_id2, p2.notes AS notes0, p2.pickup_point, p2.pickup_time, p2.segment_order, p2.mode, p2.vehicle_description
    FROM itinerary_days AS i
    LEFT JOIN itinerary_activities AS i0 ON i.id = i0.itinerary_day_id
    LEFT JOIN itinerary_day_meals AS i1 ON i.id = i1.itinerary_day_id
    LEFT JOIN package_accommodation AS p1 ON i.id = p1.itinerary_day_id
    LEFT JOIN package_transport AS p2 ON i.id = p2.itinerary_day_id
) AS t0 ON t.id = t0.package_id
LEFT JOIN package_highlights AS p3 ON t.id = p3.package_id
LEFT JOIN package_inclusions AS p4 ON t.id = p4.package_id
LEFT JOIN package_media AS p5 ON t.id = p5.package_id
LEFT JOIN package_seasonal_pricing AS p6 ON t.id = p6.package_id
LEFT JOIN reviews AS r ON t.id = r.package_id

FROM wishlists AS w
INNER JOIN packages AS p ON w.package_id = p.id
INNER JOIN packagers AS p0 ON p.packager_id = p0.id
LEFT JOIN package_media AS p1 ON p.id = p1.package_id
LEFT JOIN package_seasonal_pricing AS p2 ON p.id = p2.package_id
WHERE w.user_id = @__userId_0 AND p.status = 'published'::package_status
ORDER BY w.created_at DESC, w.id, p.id, p0.id, p1.id

FROM packages AS p
WHERE p.status = 'published'::package_status AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM package_seasonal_pricing AS p0

SELECT t.id, t.avg_rating, t.cancellation_policy, t.city, t.country, t.created_at, t.current_bookings, t.description, t.destination, t.duration_days, t.duration_nights, t.is_featured, t.max_capacity, t.min_age, t.packager_id, t.status, t.title, t.total_reviews, t.package_type, t.updated_at, p1.id, p2.id, p2.caption, p2.category, p2.display_order, p2.file_name, p2.file_path, p2.file_size_bytes, p2.is_primary, p2.mime_type, p2.package_id, p2.uploaded_at, p3.id, p3.available_slots, p3.base_price, p3.child_price, p3.discount_percent, p3.end_date, p3.is_active, p3.package_id, p3.season_name, p3.start_date, p1.approved_at, p1.approved_by, p1.avg_rating, p1.business_license_no, p1.company_name, p1.contact_email, p1.contact_phone, p1.created_at, p1.deactivated_at, p1.deactivation_reason, p1.description, p1.total_reviews, p1.updated_at, p1.user_id, p1.website_url
FROM (
    SELECT p.id, p.avg_rating, p.cancellation_policy, p.city, p.country, p.created_at, p.current_bookings, p.description, p.destination, p.duration_days, p.duration_nights, p.is_featured, p.max_capacity, p.min_age, p.packager_id, p.status, p.title, p.total_reviews, p.package_type, p.updated_at
    FROM packages AS p
    WHERE p.status = 'published'::package_status AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM package_seasonal_pricing AS p0
        WHERE p.id = p0.package_id AND p0.is_active AND p0.end_date >= @__today_0)
    ORDER BY p.created_at DESC
    LIMIT @__p_2 OFFSET @__p_1
) AS t
INNER JOIN packagers AS p1 ON t.packager_id = p1.id
LEFT JOIN package_media AS p2 ON t.id = p2.package_id
LEFT JOIN package_seasonal_pricing AS p3 ON t.id = p3.package_id
ORDER BY t.created_at DESC, t.id, p1.id, p2.id

SELECT count(*)::int
FROM packages AS p
WHERE p.status = 'published'::package_status AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM package_seasonal_pricing AS p0
    WHERE p.id = p0.package_id AND p0.is_active AND p0.end_date >= @__today_0)

SELECT t.id, t.avg_rating, t.cancellation_policy, t.city, t.country, t.created_at, t.current_bookings, t.description, t.destination, t.duration_days, t.duration_nights, t.is_featured, t.max_capacity, t.min_age, t.packager_id, t.status, t.title, t.total_reviews, t.package_type, t.updated_at, p1.id, p2.id, p2.caption, p2.category, p2.display_order, p2.file_name, p2.file_path, p2.file_size_bytes, p2.is_primary, p2.mime_type, p2.package_id, p2.uploaded_at, p3.id, p3.available_slots, p3.base_price, p3.child_price, p3.discount_percent, p3.end_date, p3.is_active, p3.package_id, p3.season_name, p3.start_date, p1.approved_at, p1.approved_by, p1.avg_rating, p1.business_license_no, p1.company_name, p1.contact_email, p1.contact_phone, p1.created_at, p1.deactivated_at, p1.deactivation_reason, p1.description, p1.total_reviews, p1.updated_at, p1.user_id, p1.website_url
FROM (
    SELECT p.id, p.avg_rating, p.cancellation_policy, p.city, p.country, p.created_at, p.current_bookings, p.description, p.destination, p.duration_days, p.duration_nights, p.is_featured, p.max_capacity, p.min_age, p.packager_id, p.status, p.title, p.total_reviews, p.package_type, p.updated_at
    FROM packages AS p
    WHERE p.status = 'published'::package_status AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM package_seasonal_pricing AS p0
        WHERE p.id = p0.package_id AND p0.is_active AND p0.end_date >= @__today_0)
    ORDER BY p.created_at DESC
    LIMIT @__p_2 OFFSET @__p_1
) AS t
INNER JOIN packagers AS p1 ON t.packager_id = p1.id
LEFT JOIN package_media AS p2 ON t.id = p2.package_id
LEFT JOIN package_seasonal_pricing AS p3 ON t.id = p3.package_id
ORDER BY t.created_at DESC, t.id, p1.id, p2.id

SELECT t.id, t.avg_rating, t.cancellation_policy, t.city, t.country, t.created_at, t.current_bookings, t.description, t.destination, t.duration_days, t.duration_nights, t.is_featured, t.max_capacity, t.min_age, t.packager_id, t.status, t.title, t.total_reviews, t.package_type, t.updated_at, p1.id, p2.id, p2.caption, p2.category, p2.display_order, p2.file_name, p2.file_path, p2.file_size_bytes, p2.is_primary, p2.mime_type, p2.package_id, p2.uploaded_at, p3.id, p3.available_slots, p3.base_price, p3.child_price, p3.discount_percent, p3.end_date, p3.is_active, p3.package_id, p3.season_name, p3.start_date, p1.approved_at, p1.approved_by, p1.avg_rating, p1.business_license_no, p1.company_name, p1.contact_email, p1.contact_phone, p1.created_at, p1.deactivated_at, p1.deactivation_reason, p1.description, p1.total_reviews, p1.updated_at, p1.user_id, p1.website_url
FROM (
    SELECT p.id, p.avg_rating, p.cancellation_policy, p.city, p.country, p.created_at, p.current_bookings, p.description, p.destination, p.duration_days, p.duration_nights, p.is_featured, p.max_capacity, p.min_age, p.packager_id, p.status, p.title, p.total_reviews, p.package_type, p.updated_at
    FROM packages AS p
    WHERE p.status = 'published'::package_status AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM package_seasonal_pricing AS p0
        WHERE p.id = p0.package_id AND p0.is_active AND p0.end_date >= @__today_0)
    ORDER BY p.created_at DESC
    LIMIT @__p_2 OFFSET @__p_1
) AS t
INNER JOIN packagers AS p1 ON t.packager_id = p1.id
LEFT JOIN package_media AS p2 ON t.id = p2.package_id
LEFT JOIN package_seasonal_pricing AS p3 ON t.id = p3.package_id
ORDER BY t.created_at DESC, t.id, p1.id, p2.id

SELECT count(*)::int
FROM packages AS p
WHERE p.status = 'published'::package_status AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM package_seasonal_pricing AS p0
    WHERE p.id = p0.package_id AND p0.is_active AND p0.end_date >= @__today_0)
2026-06-18 15:50:04.951 +05:30 [INF] Executed DbCommand (6ms) [Parameters=[@__today_0='?' (DbType = Date), @__p_2='?' (DbType = Int32), @__p_1='?' (DbType = Int32)], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT t.id, t.avg_rating, t.cancellation_policy, t.city, t.country, t.created_at, t.current_bookings, t.description, t.destination, t.duration_days, t.duration_nights, t.is_featured, t.max_capacity, t.min_age, t.packager_id, t.status, t.title, t.total_reviews, t.package_type, t.updated_at, p1.id, p2.id, p2.caption, p2.category, p2.display_order, p2.file_name, p2.file_path, p2.file_size_bytes, p2.is_primary, p2.mime_type, p2.package_id, p2.uploaded_at, p3.id, p3.available_slots, p3.base_price, p3.child_price, p3.discount_percent, p3.end_date, p3.is_active, p3.package_id, p3.season_name, p3.start_date, p1.approved_at, p1.approved_by, p1.avg_rating, p1.business_license_no, p1.company_name, p1.contact_email, p1.contact_phone, p1.created_at, p1.deactivated_at, p1.deactivation_reason, p1.description, p1.total_reviews, p1.updated_at, p1.user_id, p1.website_url
FROM (
    SELECT p.id, p.avg_rating, p.cancellation_policy, p.city, p.country, p.created_at, p.current_bookings, p.description, p.destination, p.duration_days, p.duration_nights, p.is_featured, p.max_capacity, p.min_age, p.packager_id, p.status, p.title, p.total_reviews, p.package_type, p.updated_at
    FROM packages AS p
    WHERE p.status = 'published'::package_status AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM package_seasonal_pricing AS p0
        WHERE p.id = p0.package_id AND p0.is_active AND p0.end_date >= @__today_0)
    ORDER BY p.created_at DESC
    LIMIT @__p_2 OFFSET @__p_1
) AS t
INNER JOIN packagers AS p1 ON t.packager_id = p1.id
LEFT JOIN package_media AS p2 ON t.id = p2.package_id
LEFT JOIN package_seasonal_pricing AS p3 ON t.id = p3.package_id
ORDER BY t.created_at DESC, t.id, p1.id, p2.id

SELECT t.id, t.avg_rating, t.cancellation_policy, t.city, t.country, t.created_at, t.current_bookings, t.description, t.destination, t.duration_days, t.duration_nights, t.is_featured, t.max_capacity, t.min_age, t.packager_id, t.status, t.title, t.total_reviews, t.package_type, t.updated_at, p1.id, p2.id, p2.caption, p2.category, p2.display_order, p2.file_name, p2.file_path, p2.file_size_bytes, p2.is_primary, p2.mime_type, p2.package_id, p2.uploaded_at, p3.id, p3.available_slots, p3.base_price, p3.child_price, p3.discount_percent, p3.end_date, p3.is_active, p3.package_id, p3.season_name, p3.start_date, p1.approved_at, p1.approved_by, p1.avg_rating, p1.business_license_no, p1.company_name, p1.contact_email, p1.contact_phone, p1.created_at, p1.deactivated_at, p1.deactivation_reason, p1.description, p1.total_reviews, p1.updated_at, p1.user_id, p1.website_url
FROM (
    SELECT p.id, p.avg_rating, p.cancellation_policy, p.city, p.country, p.created_at, p.current_bookings, p.description, p.destination, p.duration_days, p.duration_nights, p.is_featured, p.max_capacity, p.min_age, p.packager_id, p.status, p.title, p.total_reviews, p.package_type, p.updated_at
    FROM packages AS p
    WHERE p.status = 'published'::package_status AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM package_seasonal_pricing AS p0
        WHERE p.id = p0.package_id AND p0.is_active AND p0.end_date >= @__today_0)
    ORDER BY p.created_at DESC
    LIMIT @__p_2 OFFSET @__p_1
) AS t
INNER JOIN packagers AS p1 ON t.packager_id = p1.id
LEFT JOIN package_media AS p2 ON t.id = p2.package_id
LEFT JOIN package_seasonal_pricing AS p3 ON t.id = p3.package_id
ORDER BY t.created_at DESC, t.id, p1.id, p2.id

) AS t

    SELECT p.id, p.approved_at, p.approved_by, p.avg_rating, p.business_license_no, p.company_name, p.contact_email, p.contact_phone, p.created_at, p.deactivated_at, p.deactivation_reason, p.description, p.total_reviews, p.updated_at, p.user_id, p.website_url

    ORDER BY p.avg_rating DESC, p.company_name
    LIMIT @__p_2 OFFSET @__p_1
) AS t

ORDER BY t.avg_rating DESC, t.company_name, t.id

FROM (
    SELECT p.id, p.avg_rating, p.cancellation_policy, p.city, p.country, p.created_at, p.current_bookings, p.description, p.destination, p.duration_days, p.duration_nights, p.is_featured, p.max_capacity, p.min_age, p.packager_id, p.status, p.title, p.total_reviews, p.package_type, p.updated_at
    FROM packages AS p
    WHERE p.status = 'published'::package_status AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM package_seasonal_pricing AS p0
        WHERE p.id = p0.package_id AND p0.is_active AND p0.end_date >= @__today_0) AND (lower(p.title) LIKE @__lowerTerm_1_contains OR lower(p.destination) LIKE @__lowerTerm_1_contains_1 OR lower(p.country) LIKE @__lowerTerm_1_contains_2 OR (p.city IS NOT NULL AND lower(p.city) LIKE @__lowerTerm_1_contains_2))
    ORDER BY p.created_at DESC
    LIMIT @__p_3 OFFSET @__p_2
) AS t
INNER JOIN packagers AS p1 ON t.packager_id = p1.id
LEFT JOIN package_media AS p2 ON t.id = p2.package_id
LEFT JOIN package_seasonal_pricing AS p3 ON t.id = p3.package_id
ORDER BY t.created_at DESC, t.id, p1.id, p2.id

SELECT t.id, t.avg_rating, t.cancellation_policy, t.city, t.country, t.created_at, t.current_bookings, t.description, t.destination, t.duration_days, t.duration_nights, t.is_featured, t.max_capacity, t.min_age, t.packager_id, t.status, t.title, t.total_reviews, t.package_type, t.updated_at, p1.id, p2.id, p2.caption, p2.category, p2.display_order, p2.file_name, p2.file_path, p2.file_size_bytes, p2.is_primary, p2.mime_type, p2.package_id, p2.uploaded_at, p3.id, p3.available_slots, p3.base_price, p3.child_price, p3.discount_percent, p3.end_date, p3.is_active, p3.package_id, p3.season_name, p3.start_date, p1.approved_at, p1.approved_by, p1.avg_rating, p1.business_license_no, p1.company_name, p1.contact_email, p1.contact_phone, p1.created_at, p1.deactivated_at, p1.deactivation_reason, p1.description, p1.total_reviews, p1.updated_at, p1.user_id, p1.website_url
FROM (
    SELECT p.id, p.avg_rating, p.cancellation_policy, p.city, p.country, p.created_at, p.current_bookings, p.description, p.destination, p.duration_days, p.duration_nights, p.is_featured, p.max_capacity, p.min_age, p.packager_id, p.status, p.title, p.total_reviews, p.package_type, p.updated_at
    FROM packages AS p
    WHERE p.status = 'published'::package_status AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM package_seasonal_pricing AS p0
        WHERE p.id = p0.package_id AND p0.is_active AND p0.end_date >= @__today_0) AND (lower(p.title) LIKE @__lowerTerm_1_contains OR lower(p.destination) LIKE @__lowerTerm_1_contains_1 OR lower(p.country) LIKE @__lowerTerm_1_contains_2 OR (p.city IS NOT NULL AND lower(p.city) LIKE @__lowerTerm_1_contains_2))
    ORDER BY p.created_at DESC
    LIMIT @__p_3 OFFSET @__p_2
) AS t
INNER JOIN packagers AS p1 ON t.packager_id = p1.id
LEFT JOIN package_media AS p2 ON t.id = p2.package_id
LEFT JOIN package_seasonal_pricing AS p3 ON t.id = p3.package_id
ORDER BY t.created_at DESC, t.id, p1.id, p2.id

SELECT w.id, w.created_at, w.package_id, w.user_id, p.id, p.avg_rating, p.cancellation_policy, p.city, p.country, p.created_at, p.current_bookings, p.description, p.destination, p.duration_days, p.duration_nights, p.is_featured, p.max_capacity, p.min_age, p.packager_id, p.status, p.title, p.total_reviews, p.package_type, p.updated_at, p0.id, p0.approved_at, p0.approved_by, p0.avg_rating, p0.business_license_no, p0.company_name, p0.contact_email, p0.contact_phone, p0.created_at, p0.deactivated_at, p0.deactivation_reason, p0.description, p0.total_reviews, p0.updated_at, p0.user_id, p0.website_url, p1.id, p1.caption, p1.category, p1.display_order, p1.file_name, p1.file_path, p1.file_size_bytes, p1.is_primary, p1.mime_type, p1.package_id, p1.uploaded_at, p2.id, p2.available_slots, p2.base_price, p2.child_price, p2.discount_percent, p2.end_date, p2.is_active, p2.package_id, p2.season_name, p2.start_date
FROM wishlists AS w
INNER JOIN packages AS p ON w.package_id = p.id
INNER JOIN packagers AS p0 ON p.packager_id = p0.id
LEFT JOIN package_media AS p1 ON p.id = p1.package_id
LEFT JOIN package_seasonal_pricing AS p2 ON p.id = p2.package_id
WHERE w.user_id = @__userId_0 AND p.status = 'published'::package_status
ORDER BY w.created_at DESC, w.id, p.id, p0.id, p1.id

) AS t

FROM (
    SELECT p.id, p.avg_rating, p.cancellation_policy, p.city, p.country, p.created_at, p.current_bookings, p.description, p.destination, p.duration_days, p.duration_nights, p.is_featured, p.max_capacity, p.min_age, p.packager_id, p.status, p.title, p.total_reviews, p.package_type, p.updated_at, p0.id AS id0, p0.approved_at, p0.approved_by, p0.avg_rating AS avg_rating0, p0.business_license_no, p0.company_name, p0.contact_email, p0.contact_phone, p0.created_at AS created_at0, p0.deactivated_at, p0.deactivation_reason, p0.description AS description0, p0.total_reviews AS total_reviews0, p0.updated_at AS updated_at0, p0.user_id, p0.website_url
    FROM packages AS p
    INNER JOIN packagers AS p0 ON p.packager_id = p0.id
    WHERE p.id = @__packageId_0
    LIMIT 1
) AS t
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT i.id, i.created_at, i.day_number, i.description, i.location, i.package_id, i.title, i0.id AS id0, i0.activity_title, i0.activity_type, i0.session, i0.description AS description0, i0.duration_minutes, i0.extra_cost, i0.is_optional, i0.itinerary_day_id, i0.location AS location0, i0.sequence_order, i1.id AS id1, i1.description AS description1, i1.is_included, i1.itinerary_day_id AS itinerary_day_id0, i1.meal, i1.venue, p1.id AS id2, p1.amenities, p1.check_in_time, p1.check_out_time, p1.hotel_address, p1.hotel_name, p1.itinerary_day_id AS itinerary_day_id1, p1.notes, p1.room_type, p1.star_rating, p2.id AS id3, p2.distance_km, p2.drop_point, p2.drop_time, p2.itinerary_day_id AS itinerary_day_id2, p2.notes AS notes0, p2.pickup_point, p2.pickup_time, p2.segment_order, p2.mode, p2.vehicle_description
    FROM itinerary_days AS i
    LEFT JOIN itinerary_activities AS i0 ON i.id = i0.itinerary_day_id
    LEFT JOIN itinerary_day_meals AS i1 ON i.id = i1.itinerary_day_id
    LEFT JOIN package_accommodation AS p1 ON i.id = p1.itinerary_day_id
    LEFT JOIN package_transport AS p2 ON i.id = p2.itinerary_day_id
) AS t0 ON t.id = t0.package_id
LEFT JOIN package_highlights AS p3 ON t.id = p3.package_id
LEFT JOIN package_inclusions AS p4 ON t.id = p4.package_id
LEFT JOIN package_media AS p5 ON t.id = p5.package_id
LEFT JOIN package_seasonal_pricing AS p6 ON t.id = p6.package_id
LEFT JOIN reviews AS r ON t.id = r.package_id

    SELECT p.id, p.avg_rating, p.cancellation_policy, p.city, p.country, p.created_at, p.current_bookings, p.description, p.destination, p.duration_days, p.duration_nights, p.is_featured, p.max_capacity, p.min_age, p.packager_id, p.status, p.title, p.total_reviews, p.package_type, p.updated_at

        SELECT 1
        FROM package_seasonal_pricing AS p0

SELECT t.id, t.approved_at, t.approved_by, t.avg_rating, t.business_license_no, t.company_name, t.contact_email, t.contact_phone, t.created_at, t.deactivated_at, t.deactivation_reason, t.description, t.total_reviews, t.updated_at, t.user_id, t.website_url, p0.id, p0.avg_rating, p0.cancellation_policy, p0.city, p0.country, p0.created_at, p0.current_bookings, p0.description, p0.destination, p0.duration_days, p0.duration_nights, p0.is_featured, p0.max_capacity, p0.min_age, p0.packager_id, p0.status, p0.title, p0.total_reviews, p0.package_type, p0.updated_at
FROM (
    SELECT p.id, p.approved_at, p.approved_by, p.avg_rating, p.business_license_no, p.company_name, p.contact_email, p.contact_phone, p.created_at, p.deactivated_at, p.deactivation_reason, p.description, p.total_reviews, p.updated_at, p.user_id, p.website_url
    FROM packagers AS p
    WHERE p.approved_at IS NOT NULL AND p.deactivated_at IS NULL AND (lower(p.company_name) LIKE @__term_0_contains OR (p.description IS NOT NULL AND lower(p.description) LIKE @__term_0_contains_1))
    ORDER BY p.avg_rating DESC, p.company_name
    LIMIT @__p_2 OFFSET @__p_1
) AS t
LEFT JOIN packages AS p0 ON t.id = p0.packager_id
ORDER BY t.avg_rating DESC, t.company_name, t.id

SELECT r.id, r.accommodation_rating, r.admin_note, r.booking_id, r.comment, r.created_at, r.food_rating, r.guide_rating, r.is_verified_traveler, r.overall_rating, r.package_id, r.packager_id, r.transport_rating, r.updated_at, r.user_id, r.value_rating, u.id, u.created_at, u.email, u.full_name, u.is_active, u.is_email_verified, u.last_login_at, u.password_hash, u.phone, u.profile_picture, u."RefreshToken", u."RefreshTokenExpiryTime", u.updated_at, p.id, r0.id, r0.file_name, r0.file_path, r0.review_id, r0.uploaded_at, p.avg_rating, p.cancellation_policy, p.city, p.country, p.created_at, p.current_bookings, p.description, p.destination, p.duration_days, p.duration_nights, p.is_featured, p.max_capacity, p.min_age, p.packager_id, p.status, p.title, p.total_reviews, p.package_type, p.updated_at
FROM reviews AS r
INNER JOIN users AS u ON r.user_id = u.id
INNER JOIN packages AS p ON r.package_id = p.id
LEFT JOIN review_media AS r0 ON r.id = r0.review_id
WHERE r.packager_id = @__packagerId_0
ORDER BY r.created_at DESC, r.id, u.id, p.id
